title: Federal Reserve Board - 2022 FOMC Press Releases
summary: This page is an index listing all FOMC statements and related documents published by the Federal Reserve during 2022, including eight rate decisions, four sets of economic projections, balance sheet reduction plans, and new trading rules. The page itself contains only titles and dates—no substantive policy text or data—functioning as a navigation aid rather than an archival document.
key_points: The page is an index of 2022 FOMC documents, not a standalone policy document.
Eight FOMC statements were issued in 2022 (January, March, May, June, July, September, November, December).
Four economic projection releases accompanied FOMC meetings (March, June, September, December).

Two documents addressed balance sheet reduction: 'Plans for Reducing the Size of the Federal Reserve's Balance Sheet' (May 4) and 'Principles for Reducing the Size of the Federal Reserve's Balance Sheet' (January 26).
New trading rules for FOMC participants were formally adopted on February 18, 2022.
The page was last updated February 26, 2026, but the most recent document listed is from December 14, 2022.
why_it_matters: This index page has no standalone research value; it merely links to individual FOMC documents. Any substantive analysis would require retrieving the specific FOMC statements or projection releases directly. This source is not archiveable as a coherent record—it is a navigation page.
